AMD.reasoning: 1. MACRO REGIME: Risk-on recovery confirmed — S&P 500 at all-time highs (best April since 2020, +9% MTD), AI capex cycle intact (Alphabet/Amazon expanding), Fed held at 3.5–3.75% for a third consecutive meeting. Dominant left-tail risk is the US military blockade of Iranian ports (Goldman Brent forecast raised to $90/bbl), which could spike oil, reignite inflation, and force a Fed pivot to hawkish. Regime is transitional risk-on: directionally bullish but with a credible geopolitical veto. The AMD AI infrastructure thesis (Meta $60B deal, TSMC 2nm, hyperscaler CPU share gains) is fully validated by the macro — the bull case is intact on fundamentals. 2. RELATIVE STRENGTH: AMD 21d ROC of +74.26% vs S&P +9% MTD — extreme sector outperformance. However, wiki context confirms this is LATE in the rotation cycle: AMD ran from ~$200 to $353 ATH in 21 days (already the full move). Hourly ADX is only 15.89 (weak trend) and hourly relative volume is 0.48 (thin) — intraday momentum is losing conviction even as daily trend looks strong. Price is 52.6% above 50-SMA and 2.6 standard deviations extended on a z-score basis. This is not sector entry timing; it is late-cycle chasing. 3. ASYMMETRIC R/R MATH: Entry ~$354.50. Upside target: Fib extension 1.272 at $399.06 = +$44.56 = +12.6% upside. Stop: below hourly support at $328.81, set at $326 = -$28.50 = -8.0% downside. R/R = 12.6% / 8.0% = 1.57:1 — BELOW the 2:1 minimum threshold. The setup fails the asymmetry screen and must be passed. 4. CAPITAL PRESERVATION FLAGS: RSI at 79–86 across all daily timeframes is extreme overbought. The lessons file records the NVDA trade (identical RSI 81–87, extended macro, AI thesis valid) triggering its stop at the hourly Fib 61.8% — AMD is in the same exact configuration. Earnings binary is May 5 (approximately 4 days away) — earnings risk alone is a veto for a new swing entry. Bollinger %B at 0.929 (nearly at upper band) with a 64% band width confirms overextension. REGIME CONFLICT: macro is bullish (supports the trade) but technical overextension + poor R/R + earnings binary + lessons-confirmed pattern directly contradict a new entry here. Neutral verdict is mandatory. PREFERRED ENTRY: a pullback to $328–$335 (hourly volume-confirmed support at $328.81, aligns with wiki re-entry zone consensus) would restore 2:1+ R/R with a $390–$399 target.
